TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Majia Majia a sakuwan ku Pingtung. kumud nu kalesakan, 61.68 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 11.05 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 49.62 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 6,757 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 2,029 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 6,507 ku yincumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 96%(Paiwan, Rukai) ku kasabinawlan. u Paiwan atu Rukai ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Majia mala 6 a cuwen atu 10 ku niyazu'. kina 10 a niyazu'sa, Paljur , Zayazayan , Vecekadan , Laulauzan , Payuwan , Kazangiljan , Wakaba , Masilid , Makazayazaya , Tjanavakung . Majia a kenis (Paywan a kamu:Makazayazaya)tini i Taywan Ping-dung akuwan nuwalian satipan, nuwamisan micapi tu San-ti-men a kenis, satimulan atu saamisan mitules tu Wu-tay a kenis, satipan belaw u Ney-bu a kenis, satipan nutimulan mitules tu Wan-luan a kenis, mutinulan mitules tu Tay-u a kenis, nu Taywan uynian a dubal adidi' ku hekal caay ka edem tu cacay lasubu ping-bang-kung-li buyu'ay a yincumin a kenis. uynian a kenis zumaay Fey-di San-he a niyazu', maemic i Cang-ce-a kenis, Ne-pu a kenis atu Yin-pu a kenis a laed. uynian a kenis kakitizaan i satimulan nu Cung-yan-san-may, Ta-u a buyu' tu samisan, u lala' katalawan, caay ka lecad ku kasaenal, demiad tungusay caledes kasabalian a demiad, labu nu kenis a tademaw angangan nu Taywan Yin -cu-min Paiwan a binacadan. laylay (Makazayazaya), (Payuan) ,šłÄÁõīÁĒĪVavulengan VavulenganÁē∂Śģ∂ťē∑Śó£ÁāļŚĺźśė•Áĺé(Eleng Vavulengan), (Tjaugadu)Śģ∂śóŹśďĒšĽĽť†ėŚįé. Majia a kenis u Paywan nu Makazayazaya Ma-suy-li-de, Wa-ka-pa, Ka-ca-ci-lan, Payuan tu pienengan,Makazayazaya i kamu nu Paiwan u "matekinihay a lala' han", u imi uyzaan a niyazu' pienengan i kalikidan nu nanum tu masaapilisay a lala'an, Majia i nu kasumamadan ayaw nu pikuwan nu Lipun a ziday, mahiza tu uiya ci Vavulengan a tumuk a lalumaan tungus mala u satalakaway nu mukeliday, i mahini ci Vavulengan malau sakakaay a wawa ci Eleng Vavulengan, imahini uynian lalabu nu luma' izaw kunisulitan katukuh sabaw enem a iluc, Paiwan kakitizaan u Paiwan ci Tjaugadu a lalumaan ku mala mikeliday. pikuwaan nu Lipun a ziday mabulaw ku zuma' a tademaw, patizeng tu kakitizaan nu Taylin milisimet tu kawaw, i 1920 a mihcaan a kakitizaan misumat tu lice makakenis tungus tu nu Kaw-sing zou-caw zou-cun, zikuzan nu ngangayaw hawsa saayaway uynian limaay a niyazu' pasumat han ngangan u Majia, pay-ye, Ling-san, Cia-i', Ba-wan satu pangangan aca Paywan han, zayhan nisulitan i cudad tu nakamuwan laylay nu Ta-u a buyu' "Kavulugan" sanay sa, Payuan a niyazu' nu Taywan yincumin Paywan a binacadan lalekalan a lala', uyza sa makay Taywan Seng-cen-fu i 1986 a mihcaan sepat a bulad tusa a demiad uyni a ngiha' ku patelacay Fa-wan a niyazu' pangangan Paywan a niyazu', na u yaanay nipanutekan kenis a ngangan u "Ma-cya-sa" han, namahiza sa i 1946 a mihcaan pasumat Majia a kenis han tu, kakenis tungus nu Kaw-sing akuwan ku mikuwanay, 1950 a mihcaan pasumat tungusay tu nu Pin-tung akuwan katukuh ayza. piidangan Taywan yincumin piazihan tu lalangawan nuwamisan Ta-wu a buyu' tu satipan a cascas nu batu'ay a luma' nu Paiwan a binacadan Ping-tung Majia a kenis piidangan tu malukay mibutingay a kakitizaan Fa-wan-se-lu malumanay a kasaniyazu' kasumamadan nisubelidan tu tuud Pay-ping a buyu' Ping-tung kapahay salunganay a pilapinan Lian-san a cascas Li-na-li a niyazu' Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw/Shanchuan Glass Suspension Bridge Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw tini i Taywan Maw-lin piazihan tu hekal nu kantal a kakitizaan, mitulesay tu Ping-tung akuwan San-ti-men a kenis atu Majia a kenis tu caculilang nu tademaw cuyacuy a sangaw, miawas tu Kaw-ping sauwac adidi'ay cilis Ay-liaw a sauwac, u uzip nu sangaw u masacuyacuyay a sangaw, katanayu' a sangaw 262 kung-ce, laed tu sauwac palalecad tu talakaw sepat bataan izaw ku lima debah, nau satanayaay masacuyacuay a sangaw, katukuh 2017 a mihcaan u Tuing atuse Fu-sing a kakitizaan u baluhay a sacumud nu sauwac cuyavuy a sangaw "katanayu' nu sangaw 303 debah malakuit tuway". Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw/Shanchuan Glass Suspension Bridge u satakus tu Ping-tung akuwan San-ti-men a kenis San-ti a niyazu' atu Majia a kenis Pa-ye a niyazu' tu cuyacuy a sangaw, tunusay masacuyacuyay a sangaw, u sakatuuday pitubian tu tademaw cacay lasubu, Liu-li-cu a sakahini tu pipazeng nu Paiwan a binacadan a Yi-su-ciya ci Sa-ku-liw-pa-wa-wa-lung mibihekacan a misanga', u uzip nu sangaw tusaay a takinilan izaw kunipazeng tu tulu bataan izaw ku tusa a paya' tu kungku, nusakamu 32 masazumaay a kungku nu niyazu', cuyacuy a sangaw i sacumut atu katukuhan patizeng tu Ma-say-ke yi-su-zuo-pin atu tabakiay a ba'tu kunipazeng tu yi-su. uzip tu sangaw tusa a takinilan pahezek tu pitanam katukuh tatengaay tu amiculul a demiadan micunus tu mipazeng tu 1,664 ku Liu-li-cu. malumanay a Fa-wan a niyazu' na u Paiwanay tu ,Rukai a binacadan u lalangawan a tuas ulalekalan a lala' nu tuas, malumanay a Fa-wan u talakaw pakala tu 800 debah, ba'tuay aluma' micangday tu butu' amipatizeng atu nu ayawan a buyu' tu Se-lu, Kaw-yan atu kapahay aucya niyazu' silaed tu ai-liau nutimulan a sauwac, ilabu ku kakitizaan nu Paiwan a binacadan a kakawsan a buyu' "Ta-uw a buyu'", kasilut nu Paiwan a binacadan ba'tuay a luma' masupet u masakapahay malisimed u mahiniay nusuayaway tu butu' micapiay tu nanum, u satalakaway a maazih ku kakitizaan a lala' pawapen tu kasumamadanay tu Fa-wan a tademaw lihalay kunikauzip, uyza sa amitena' tu miubiay tu kapahay a ucya, i saayaway a mihcaan u Fa-wan niyazu' a tademaw katukuh tu cacay lasubu kayadah ku luma', u pikuwanay nu Lipun a ziday Lipun a tademaw napacici tu Se-lu atu Kaw-yan tusaay niyazu'an a tademaw, mabulaw tayza i Fa-wan, Taywan napatizang hawsa ku-min-cen-bu pasilut aca tu tuluay niyazu' a tademaw mabulaw ku niyazu' tayza i ayzaay Pa-yia, Majia atu Fa-wan a niyazu', nauyaanan u Fa-wan a niyazu' pasumad han ku ngangan u malumanay Fa-wan. nipalumaan mang-gu yincumin nituktukan atu nalimaan Majia a niyazu' lalekalan a kungku nu babalaki nu Taywan Paiwan a binacadan Majia a niyazu' "Paiwan a kamu, Makazayazaya, tini i Pin-tung akuwan Majia a niyazu' a niyazu'" lalekalan a kungku nu babalaki, uyni u tumuk kalecuhan u angangan nilaculan. kasumamadan a zitay , izaw kya cacay a tademaw makayba'tu tahkal, izaw ku nu dituay a icelangciniza miawza tu tademaw, satu auynian misaupu tu katuuday a tademaw, patizeng tu niyazu', mala u tumuk nuheni.
S.PHON: majia majia a sakuwan ku piŇčtuŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, **.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti **.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku jin ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paiwan, *ukai) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u paiwan atu *ukai ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan majia mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, par~…ĺjur , zajazajan , *…ô ¶…ôkadan , r~…ĺaur~…ĺauzan , pajuwan , kazaŇčir~…ĺjan , wakaba , masir~…ĺid , makazajazaja , tjana*akuŇč . majia a k…ônis (pajwan a kamu:makazajazaja)tini i tajwan piŇč-duŇč akuwan nuwar~…ĺian satipan, nuwamisan mi ¶api tu san-ti-m…ôn a k…ônis, satimur~…ĺan atu saamisan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu wu-taj a k…ônis, satipan b…ôr~…ĺaw u n…ô-bu a k…ônis, satipan nutimur~…ĺan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu wan-r~…ĺuan a k…ônis, mutinur~…ĺan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu taj-u a k…ônis, nu tajwan ujnian a dubar~…ĺ adidi Ē~ ° ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ¶aaj ka …ôd…ôm tu ¶a ¶aj ujnian a k…ônis kakitizaan i satimur~…ĺan nu ¶uŇč-jan-san-maj, ta-u a buju Ē~ ° tu samisan, u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° katar~…ĺawan, ¶aaj ka r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kasa…ônar~…ĺ, d…ômiad tuŇčusaj ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs kasabar~…ĺian a d…ômiad, r~…ĺabu nu k…ônis a tad…ômaw aŇčaŇčan nu tajwan jin - ¶u-min paiwan a bina ¶adan. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj (makazajazaja), (pajuan) ,****a*ur~…ĺ…ôŇčan *a*ur~…ĺ…ôŇčan********(…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč "ma- ¶ja-sa" ńßan, namańßiza sa i **** a mińß ¶aan pasumat majia a k…ônis ńßan tu, kak…ônis tuŇčus nu kaw-siŇč akuwan ku mikuwanaj, **** a mińß ¶aan pasumat tuŇčusaj tu nu pin-tuŇč akuwan katukuńß ajza. piidaŇčan tajwan jin ¶umin piazińßan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nuwamisan ta-wu a buju Ē~ ° tu satipan a ¶as ¶as nu batu Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu paiwan a bina ¶adan piŇč-tuŇč majia a k…ônis piidaŇčan tu mar~…ĺukaj mibutiŇčaj a kakitizaan fa-wan-s…ô-r~…ĺu mar~…ĺumanaj a kasanijazu Ē~ ° kasumamadan nisub…ôr~…ĺidan tu tuud paj-piŇč a buju Ē~ ° piŇč-tuŇč kapańßaj sar~…ĺuŇčanaj a pir~…ĺapinan r~…ĺian-san a ¶as ¶as r~…ĺi-na-r~…ĺi a nijazu Ē~ ° sńßan- ¶ńßuan ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw sńßan- ¶ńßuan ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw/sńßan ¶ńßuan gr~…ĺass susp…ônsion bridg…ô sńßan- ¶ńßuan ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw tini i tajwan maw-r~…ĺin piazińßan tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kantar~…ĺ a kakitizaan, mitur~…ĺ…ôsaj tu piŇč-tuŇč akuwan san-ti-m…ôn a k…ônis atu majia a k…ônis tu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaŇč nu tad…ômaw ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw, miawas tu kaw-piŇč sauwa ¶ adidi Ē~ °aj ¶ir~…ĺis aj-r~…ĺiaw a sauwa ¶, u uzip nu saŇčaw u masa ¶uja ¶ujaj a saŇčaw, katanaju Ē~ ° a saŇčaw *** kuŇč- ¶…ô, r~…ĺa…ôd tu sauwa ¶ par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tar~…ĺakaw s…ôpat bataan izaw ku r~…ĺima d…ôbańß, nau satanajaaj masa ¶uja ¶uaj a saŇčaw, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan u tuiŇč atus…ô fu-siŇč a kakitizaan u bar~…ĺuńßaj a sa ¶umud nu sauwa ¶ ¶uja*uj a saŇčaw "katanaju Ē~ ° nu saŇčaw *** d…ôbańß mar~…ĺakuit tuwaj". sńßan- ¶ńßuan ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw/sńßan ¶ńßuan gr~…ĺass susp…ônsion bridg…ô u satakus tu piŇč-tuŇč akuwan san-ti-m…ôn a k…ônis san-ti a nijazu Ē~ ° atu majia a k…ônis pa-j…ô a nijazu Ē~ ° tu ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw, tunusaj masa ¶uja ¶ujaj a saŇčaw, u sakatuudaj pitubian tu tad…ômaw ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu, r~…ĺiu-r~…ĺi- ¶u a sakańßini tu pipaz…ôŇč nu paiwan a bina ¶adan a ji-su- ¶ija ¶i sa-ku-r~…ĺiw-pa-wa-wa-r~…ĺuŇč mibińß…ôka ¶an a misaŇča Ē~ °, u uzip nu saŇčaw tusaaj a takinir~…ĺan izaw kunipaz…ôŇč tu tur~…ĺu bataan izaw ku tusa a paja Ē~ ° tu kuŇčku, nusakamu ** masazumaaj a kuŇčku nu nijazu Ē~ °, ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw i sa ¶umut atu katukuńßan patiz…ôŇč tu ma-saj-k…ô ji-su-zuo-pin atu tabakiaj a ba Ē~ °tu kunipaz…ôŇč tu ji-su. uzip tu saŇčaw tusa a takinir~…ĺan pańß…ôz…ôk tu pitanam katukuńß tat…ôŇčaaj tu ami ¶ur~…ĺur~…ĺ a d…ômiadan mi ¶unus tu mipaz…ôŇč tu *,*** ku r~…ĺiu-r~…ĺi- ¶u. mar~…ĺumanaj a fa-wan a nijazu Ē~ ° na u paiwanaj tu ,*ukai a bina ¶adan u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a tuas ur~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu tuas, mar~…ĺumanaj a fa-wan u tar~…ĺakaw pakar~…ĺa tu *** d…ôbańß, ba Ē~ °tuaj ar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mi ¶aŇčdaj tu butu Ē~ ° amipatiz…ôŇč atu nu ajawan a buju Ē~ ° tu s…ô-r~…ĺu, kaw-jan atu kapańßaj au ¶ja nijazu Ē~ ° sir~…ĺa…ôd tu ai-r~…ĺiau nutimur~…ĺan a sauwa ¶, ir~…ĺabu ku kakitizaan nu paiwan a bina ¶adan a kakawsan a buju Ē~ ° "ta-uw a buju Ē~ °", kasir~…ĺut nu paiwan a bina ¶adan ba Ē~ °tuaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° masup…ôt u masakapańßaj mar~…ĺisim…ôd u mańßiniaj nusuajawaj tu butu Ē~ ° mi ¶apiaj tu nanum, u satar~…ĺakawaj a maazińß ku kakitizaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° pawap…ôn tu kasumamadanaj tu fa-wan a tad…ômaw r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj kunikauzip, ujza sa amit…ôna Ē~ ° tu miubiaj tu kapańßaj a u ¶ja, i saajawaj a mińß ¶aan u fa-wan nijazu Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw katukuńß tu ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu kajadańß ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, u pikuwanaj nu r~…ĺipun a zidaj r~…ĺipun a tad…ômaw napa ¶i ¶i tu s…ô-r~…ĺu atu kaw-jan tusaaj nijazu Ē~ °an a tad…ômaw, mabur~…ĺaw tajza i fa-wan, tajwan napatizaŇč ńßawsa ku-min- ¶…ôn-bu pasir~…ĺut a ¶a tu tur~…ĺuaj nijazu Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw mabur~…ĺaw ku nijazu Ē~ ° tajza i ajzaaj pa-jia, majia atu fa-wan a nijazu Ē~ °, naujaanan u fa-wan a nijazu Ē~ ° pasumad ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan u mar~…ĺumanaj fa-wan. nipar~…ĺumaan maŇč-gu jin ¶umin nituktukan atu nar~…ĺimaan majia a nijazu Ē~ ° r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a kuŇčku nu babar~…ĺaki nu tajwan paiwan a bina ¶adan majia a nijazu Ē~ ° "paiwan a kamu, makazajazaja, tini i pin-tuŇč akuwan majia a nijazu Ē~ ° a nijazu Ē~ °" r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a kuŇčku nu babar~…ĺaki, ujni u tumuk kar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan u aŇčaŇčan nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan. kasumamadan a zitaj , izaw kja ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômaw makajba Ē~ °tu tańßkar~…ĺ, izaw ku nu dituaj a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶iniza miawza tu tad…ômaw, satu aujnian misaupu tu katuudaj a tad…ômaw, patiz…ôŇč tu nijazu Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa u tumuk nuńß…ôni.
S.FORM: Majia Majia a sakuwan ku Pingtung. kumud nu kalesakan, 61.68 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 11.05 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 49.62 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 6,757 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 2,029 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 6,507 ku yincumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 96%(Paiwan, Rukai) ku kasabinawlan. u Paiwan atu Rukai ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Majia mala 6 a cuwen atu 10 ku niyazu'. kina 10 a niyazu'sa, Paljur , Zayazayan , Vecekadan , Laulauzan , Payuwan , Kazangiljan , Wakaba , Masilid , Makazayazaya , Tjanavakung . Majia a kenis (Paywan a kamu:Makazayazaya)tini i Taywan Ping-dung akuwan nuwalian satipan, nuwamisan micapi tu San-ti-men a kenis, satimulan atu saamisan mitules tu Wu-tay a kenis, satipan belaw u Ney-bu a kenis, satipan nutimulan mitules tu Wan-luan a kenis, mutinulan mitules tu Tay-u a kenis, nu Taywan uynian a dubal adidi' ku hekal caay ka edem tu cacay lasubu ping-bang-kung-li buyu'ay a yincumin a kenis. uynian a kenis zumaay Fey-di San-he a niyazu', maemic i Cang-ce-a kenis, Ne-pu a kenis atu Yin-pu a kenis a laed. uynian a kenis kakitizaan i satimulan nu Cung-yan-san-may, Ta-u a buyu' tu samisan, u lala' katalawan, caay ka lecad ku kasaenal, demiad tungusay caledes kasabalian a demiad, labu nu kenis a tademaw angangan nu Taywan Yin -cu-min Paiwan a binacadan. laylay (Makazayazaya), (Payuan) ,šłÄÁõīÁĒĪVavulengan VavulenganÁē∂Śģ∂ťē∑Śó£ÁāļŚĺźśė•Áĺé(Eleng Vavulengan), (Tjaugadu)Śģ∂śóŹśďĒšĽĽť†ėŚįé. Majia a kenis u Paywan nu Makazayazaya Ma-suy-li-de, Wa-ka-pa, Ka-ca-ci-lan, Payuan tu pienengan,Makazayazaya i kamu nu Paiwan u "matekinihay a lala' han", u imi uyzaan a niyazu' pienengan i kalikidan nu nanum tu masaapilisay a lala'an, Majia i nu kasumamadan ayaw nu pikuwan nu Lipun a ziday, mahiza tu uiya ci Vavulengan a tumuk a lalumaan tungus mala u satalakaway nu mukeliday, i mahini ci Vavulengan malau sakakaay a wawa ci Eleng Vavulengan, imahini uynian lalabu nu luma' izaw kunisulitan katukuh sabaw enem a iluc, Paiwan kakitizaan u Paiwan ci Tjaugadu a lalumaan ku mala mikeliday. pikuwaan nu Lipun a ziday mabulaw ku zuma' a tademaw, patizeng tu kakitizaan nu Taylin milisimet tu kawaw, i 1920 a mihcaan a kakitizaan misumat tu lice makakenis tungus tu nu Kaw-sing zou-caw zou-cun, zikuzan nu ngangayaw hawsa saayaway uynian limaay a niyazu' pasumat han ngangan u Majia, pay-ye, Ling-san, Cia-i', Ba-wan satu pangangan aca Paywan han, zayhan nisulitan i cudad tu nakamuwan laylay nu Ta-u a buyu' "Kavulugan" sanay sa, Payuan a niyazu' nu Taywan yincumin Paywan a binacadan lalekalan a lala', uyza sa makay Taywan Seng-cen-fu i 1986 a mihcaan sepat a bulad tusa a demiad uyni a ngiha' ku patelacay Fa-wan a niyazu' pangangan Paywan a niyazu', na u yaanay nipanutekan kenis a ngangan u "Ma-cya-sa" han, namahiza sa i 1946 a mihcaan pasumat Majia a kenis han tu, kakenis tungus nu Kaw-sing akuwan ku mikuwanay, 1950 a mihcaan pasumat tungusay tu nu Pin-tung akuwan katukuh ayza. piidangan Taywan yincumin piazihan tu lalangawan nuwamisan Ta-wu a buyu' tu satipan a cascas nu batu'ay a luma' nu Paiwan a binacadan Ping-tung Majia a kenis piidangan tu malukay mibutingay a kakitizaan Fa-wan-se-lu malumanay a kasaniyazu' kasumamadan nisubelidan tu tuud Pay-ping a buyu' Ping-tung kapahay salunganay a pilapinan Lian-san a cascas Li-na-li a niyazu' Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw/Shanchuan Glass Suspension Bridge Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw tini i Taywan Maw-lin piazihan tu hekal nu kantal a kakitizaan, mitulesay tu Ping-tung akuwan San-ti-men a kenis atu Majia a kenis tu caculilang nu tademaw cuyacuy a sangaw, miawas tu Kaw-ping sauwac adidi'ay cilis Ay-liaw a sauwac, u uzip nu sangaw u masacuyacuyay a sangaw, katanayu' a sangaw 262 kung-ce, laed tu sauwac palalecad tu talakaw sepat bataan izaw ku lima debah, nau satanayaay masacuyacuay a sangaw, katukuh 2017 a mihcaan u Tuing atuse Fu-sing a kakitizaan u baluhay a sacumud nu sauwac cuyavuy a sangaw "katanayu' nu sangaw 303 debah malakuit tuway". Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw/Shanchuan Glass Suspension Bridge u satakus tu Ping-tung akuwan San-ti-men a kenis San-ti a niyazu' atu Majia a kenis Pa-ye a niyazu' tu cuyacuy a sangaw, tunusay masacuyacuyay a sangaw, u sakatuuday pitubian tu tademaw cacay lasubu, Liu-li-cu a sakahini tu pipazeng nu Paiwan a binacadan a Yi-su-ciya ci Sa-ku-liw-pa-wa-wa-lung mibihekacan a misanga', u uzip nu sangaw tusaay a takinilan izaw kunipazeng tu tulu bataan izaw ku tusa a paya' tu kungku, nusakamu 32 masazumaay a kungku nu niyazu', cuyacuy a sangaw i sacumut atu katukuhan patizeng tu Ma-say-ke yi-su-zuo-pin atu tabakiay a ba'tu kunipazeng tu yi-su. uzip tu sangaw tusa a takinilan pahezek tu pitanam katukuh tatengaay tu amiculul a demiadan micunus tu mipazeng tu 1,664 ku Liu-li-cu. malumanay a Fa-wan a niyazu' na u Paiwanay tu ,Rukai a binacadan u lalangawan a tuas ulalekalan a lala' nu tuas, malumanay a Fa-wan u talakaw pakala tu 800 debah, ba'tuay aluma' micangday tu butu' amipatizeng atu nu ayawan a buyu' tu Se-lu, Kaw-yan atu kapahay aucya niyazu' silaed tu ai-liau nutimulan a sauwac, ilabu ku kakitizaan nu Paiwan a binacadan a kakawsan a buyu' "Ta-uw a buyu'", kasilut nu Paiwan a binacadan ba'tuay a luma' masupet u masakapahay malisimed u mahiniay nusuayaway tu butu' micapiay tu nanum, u satalakaway a maazih ku kakitizaan a lala' pawapen tu kasumamadanay tu Fa-wan a tademaw lihalay kunikauzip, uyza sa amitena' tu miubiay tu kapahay a ucya, i saayaway a mihcaan u Fa-wan niyazu' a tademaw katukuh tu cacay lasubu kayadah ku luma', u pikuwanay nu Lipun a ziday Lipun a tademaw napacici tu Se-lu atu Kaw-yan tusaay niyazu'an a tademaw, mabulaw tayza i Fa-wan, Taywan napatizang hawsa ku-min-cen-bu pasilut aca tu tuluay niyazu' a tademaw mabulaw ku niyazu' tayza i ayzaay Pa-yia, Majia atu Fa-wan a niyazu', nauyaanan u Fa-wan a niyazu' pasumad han ku ngangan u malumanay Fa-wan. nipalumaan mang-gu yincumin nituktukan atu nalimaan Majia a niyazu' lalekalan a kungku nu babalaki nu Taywan Paiwan a binacadan Majia a niyazu' "Paiwan a kamu, Makazayazaya, tini i Pin-tung akuwan Majia a niyazu' a niyazu'" lalekalan a kungku nu babalaki, uyni u tumuk kalecuhan u angangan nilaculan. kasumamadan a zitay , izaw kya cacay a tademaw makayba'tu tahkal, izaw ku nu dituay a icelangciniza miawza tu tademaw, satu auynian misaupu tu katuuday a tademaw, patizeng tu niyazu', mala u tumuk nuheni.
S.PHON: majia majia a sakuwan ku piŇčtuŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, **.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti **.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku jin ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paiwan, *ukai) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u paiwan atu *ukai ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan majia mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, par~…ĺjur , zajazajan , *…ô ¶…ôkadan , r~…ĺaur~…ĺauzan , pajuwan , kazaŇčir~…ĺjan , wakaba , masir~…ĺid , makazajazaja , tjana*akuŇč . majia a k…ônis (pajwan a kamu:makazajazaja)tini i tajwan piŇč-duŇč akuwan nuwar~…ĺian satipan, nuwamisan mi ¶api tu san-ti-m…ôn a k…ônis, satimur~…ĺan atu saamisan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu wu-taj a k…ônis, satipan b…ôr~…ĺaw u paja Ē~ ° tu kuŇčku, nusakamu ** masazumaaj a kuŇčku nu nijazu Ē~ °, ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw i sa ¶umut atu katukuńßan patiz…ôŇč tu ma-saj-k…ô ji-su-zuo-pin atu tabakiaj a ba Ē~ °tu kunipaz…ôŇč tu ji-su. uzip tu saŇčaw tusa a takinir~…ĺan pańß…ôz…ôk tu pitanam katukuńß tat…ôŇčaaj tu ami ¶ur~…ĺur~…ĺ a d…ômiadan mi ¶unus tu mipaz…ôŇč tu *,*** ku r~…ĺiu-r~…ĺi- ¶u. mar~…ĺumanaj a fa-wan a nijazu Ē~ ° na u ¶aŇčdaj tu butu Ē~ ° amipatiz…ôŇč atu nu ajawan a buju Ē~ ° tu s…ô-r~…ĺu, kaw-jan atu kapańßaj au ¶ja nijazu Ē~ ° sir~…ĺa…ôd tu ai-r~…ĺiau nutimur~…ĺan a sauwa ¶, ir~…ĺabu ku kakitizaan nu paiwan a bina ¶adan a kakawsan a buju Ē~ ° "ta-uw a buju Ē~ °", kasir~…ĺut nu paiwan a bina ¶adan ba Ē~ °tuaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° masup…ôt u masakapańßaj mar~…ĺisim…ôd u mańßiniaj nusuajawaj tu butu Ē~ ° mi ¶apiaj tu nanum, u satar~…ĺakawaj a maazińß ku kakitizaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° pawap…ôn tu kasumamadanaj tu fa-wan a tad…ômaw r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj kunikauzip, ujza sa amit…ôna Ē~ ° tu miubiaj tu kapańßaj a u ¶ja, i saajawaj a mińß ¶aan u fa-wan nijazu Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw katukuńß tu ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu kajadańß ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, u pikuwanaj nu r~…ĺipun a zidaj r~…ĺipun a tad…ômaw napa ¶i ¶i tu s…ô-r~…ĺu atu kaw-jan tusaaj nijazu Ē~ °an a tad…ômaw, mabur~…ĺaw tajza i fa-wan, tajwan napatizaŇč ńßawsa ku-min- ¶…ôn-bu pasir~…ĺut a ¶a tu tur~…ĺuaj nijazu Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw mabur~…ĺaw ku nijazu Ē~ ° tajza i ajzaaj pa-jia, majia atu fa-wan a nijazu Ē~ °, naujaanan u fa-wan a nijazu Ē~ ° pasumad ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan u mar~…ĺumanaj fa-wan. nipar~…ĺumaan maŇč-gu jin ¶umin nituktukan atu nar~…ĺimaan majia a nijazu Ē~ ° r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a kuŇčku nu babar~…ĺaki nu tajwan paiwan a bina ¶adan majia a nijazu Ē~ ° "paiwan a kamu, makazajazaja, tini i pin-tuŇč akuwan majia a nijazu Ē~ ° a nijazu Ē~ °" r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a kuŇčku nu babar~…ĺaki, ujni u tumuk kar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan u aŇčaŇčan nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan. kasumamadan a zitaj , izaw kja ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômaw makajba Ē~ °tu tańßkar~…ĺ, izaw ku nu dituaj a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶iniza miawza tu tad…ômaw, satu aujnian misaupu tu katuudaj a tad…ômaw, patiz…ôŇč tu nijazu Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa u tumuk nuńß…ôni.
